summary: Completed testing of Onboarding Wizard feature. All 6 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend UI flows verified working correctly including 4-step wizard navigation, skip button, and completion flow.
critical_code_review_comments: Onboarding wizard properly integrated with DashboardPage - shows only when onboarding_completed=false
All 4 steps have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Progress indicator correctly highlights current step with checkmarks for completed steps
Green banner 'Máte vytvořené programy' correctly shows when user has programs
Skip button (X) properly dismisses wizard and marks onboarding as complete
Czech language UI throughout the wizard
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding wizard fully tested. Backend: GET /api/onboarding/status returns {completed, steps} with has_programs and program_count. POST /api/onboarding/complete marks onboarding as done. Both endpoints require authentication (return 403 without token). Frontend: Wizard appears on dashboard when onboarding_completed=false. 4 steps: Welcome, Create Program, Availability, Done. Skip button (X) dismisses wizard. Progress indicator shows step numbers with checkmarks. Demo institution ID: 669e71b2-a8e7-4eb0-ac13-8b8c4f3107a5. To reset onboarding for testing: UPDATE institutions SET onboarding_completed = false WHERE id = '669e71b2-a8e7-4eb0-ac13-8b8c4f3107a5'

verified_features.feature: Backend: GET /api/onboarding/status returns onboarding status with completed flag and steps
Backend: POST /api/onboarding/complete marks onboarding as done
Frontend: Dashboard shows onboarding wizard card when onboarding is not completed
Frontend: Wizard step 1 (Welcome) shows greeting with user name and 'Začít nastavení' button
Frontend: Click 'Začít nastavení' advances to step 2 (Create Program)
Frontend: Step 2 shows green banner 'Máte vytvořené programy' when user has programs
Frontend: Step 3 shows availability setup info and link to availability page
Frontend: Step 4 shows 'Přejít na dashboard' button which completes onboarding
Frontend: X button (skip) dismisses onboarding and marks as complete
Frontend: After completing onboarding, wizard card disappears from dashboard
Frontend: Progress indicator shows correct step highlighted
